holdings.name: JPMorgan Prime Money Market Fund Class IM

raw.n: JPMorgan Prime Money Market Fund Class IM

holdings.n: JPMorgan Prime Money Market Fund Class IM

overview.description: The JPMorgan Mortgage-Backed Securities ETF (JMTG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, seeking to maximize total return through investments in USD-denominated mortgage-backed securities (MBS). Securities are rated investment grade and have intermediate maturities. JMTG was launched on Jun 27, 2025 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
